content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.patients_inc', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.patients_inc;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.patients_inc
(
    patient_id      INT           NULL,
    patient_name    VARCHAR(200)  NULL,
    gender          VARCHAR(50)   NULL,
    created_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL,
    updated_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL,
    load_run_id     VARCHAR(100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.visits_inc', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.visits_inc;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.visits_inc
(
    visit_id        INT           NULL,
    patient_id      INT           NULL,
    visit_date      DATE          NULL,
    created_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL,
    updated_at_utc  DATETIME2     NULL,
    load_run_id     VARCHAR(100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO
